title: Copy the value of a mirrored People column to another People column
excerpt:
I am trying to copy the value of a mirrored People column to another People column and it doesn’t appear to be working. 
I am using General caster to do this  ’ when any column changes perform formula (Item’s assigned) a…

posts.author: declan.maher (declan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to copy the value of a mirrored People column to another People column and it doesn’t appear to be working.
I am using General caster to do this ’ when any column changes perform formula (Item’s assigned) and cast result to People.’ Could anybody help me understand why this isn’t working please?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @declan.maher

Our partner WorkPerfect has an app that copies the content of a mirror column to a real column of the same type. You can contact @Kimb for details.

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @basdebruin.
Hi @declan.maher, please email me at kim@workperfect.io. Our app will be able to solve this problem for you : )

posts.author: declan.maher (declan)
posts.cookedHtml:
FYI there is a way of doing this in Monday.com without using an app.

Create an automation for the following:
“When an item is created Assign (replace)(Assigned) As People”

Assigned is a mirrored column.
Hope this helps someone!

posts.author: greg-hrc (Greg Collette)
posts.cookedHtml: @declan.maher how did you set up that automation exactly? When I use the “Then do this” action of “Assign person” the only options I see for that middle part are board subscribers, not other columns.

posts.author: DanCrum (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: @declan.maher That automation would work perfectly, except (Assigned) doesn’t allow for selection of a column, it’s looking for a specific person.

posts.author: Lfer (leo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Declan, that automation locks you to the moment of the creation of the item. If there’s an update on the source board, you’re then out of sync.
A third-party app is probably the only way to keep your columns updated.
